privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Sentrifugo HRMS instance with employees seeded via setup_sentrifugo.sh. I verified that the instructions and target values explicitly required by the agent (target employees EMP008, EMP010, EMP012, EMP015, EMP018, EMP020, new job title 'Divestiture Transition Staff', new employment status 'Divested Entity', and new email domain '@qaserve.com') are dynamically written to a desktop memo by setup_task.sh and strictly enforced by the scoring logic in verifier.py. Notably, while the narrative memo claims the divested employees belong to 'Quality Assurance and Customer Support', the seed data actually assigns these specific employees to diverse departments like HR, Finance, Data Science, DevOps, and Marketing.
